titles.romaji: Shinja Zero no Megami-sama to Hajimeru Isekai Kouryaku
titles.native: 信者ゼロの女神サマと始める異世界攻略
synonyms: Full Clearing Another World under a Goddess with Zero Believers
Clear the world like a game with the zero believer goddess
titles.tmdb_title: Full Clearing Another World under a Goddess with Zero Believers

description:
RPG player Makoto Takatsuki is hurled into another world with awful skills and stats. But he soon meets a goddess named Noah, who asks him to become her 1st believer in return for blessings.

(Source: J-Novel Club)
